attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.COMPETENCE_DEFINITION_ID, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.REQUEST_ID, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.ID_FLEX_NUM, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SUMMARY_FLAG, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.ENABLED_FLAG, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT1, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT2, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT3, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT4, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT5, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT6, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT7, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT8, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT9, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT10, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT11, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT12, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT13, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT14, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT15, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT16, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT17, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT18, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT19, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT20, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT21, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT22, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT23, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT24, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT25, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT26, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT27, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT28, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT29, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SEGMENT30, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS,
(
select COMPETENCE_DEFINITION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS
minus
select COMPETENCE_DEFINITION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.COMPETENCE_DEFINITION_ID = STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.COMPETENCE_DEFINITION_ID and 
 ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PER_COMPETENCE_DEFINITIONS)
